CVE-2020-12861.title: A heap buffer overflow in SANE Backends before 1.0.30 allows a ma ...
CVE-2020-12861.summary: A heap buffer overflow in SANE Backends before 1.0.30 allows a malicious device connected to the same local network as the victim to execute arbitrary code, aka GHSL-2020-080.

CVE-2020-12862.title: An out-of-bounds read in SANE Backends before 1.0.30 may allow a  ...
CVE-2020-12862.summary: An out-of-bounds read in SANE Backends before 1.0.30 may allow a malicious device connected to the same local network as the victim to read important information, such as the ASLR offsets of the program, aka GHSL-2020-082.
